_comment: Foreign Void Rift Wastes (外域虚空裂痕荒原) — the unstable boundary region of the Foreign Battleground where the void bleeds through and outsiders invade. Canon: a shattered wasteland where the dimensional boundary is thin, terrain is broken and floating, and the purple void fog never clears. This is the invasion corridor used by outsiders; endermen stand in for void walkers, phantoms for the winged outsiders, and vexes for the void invaders that slip through the rifts. End gateways serve as stand-ins for the void rifts themselves; patch_fire represents the chaotic energy bleeding through the boundary. Prime Directive: the void rifts and the outsider invasion are objective phenomena — the boundary was objectively damaged during the ancient war and has never healed regardless of the player's perception.
